summary: Tested CNPJ lookup via BrasilAPI feature. Backend API and Frontend UI integration working correctly. The CNPJ lookup successfully fetches company data from Receita Federal and auto-fills the form fields.
passed_tests: Backend: CNPJ lookup for Banco do Brasil (00000000000191) - Returns correct company data
Backend: CNPJ lookup with invalid CNPJ (less than 14 digits) - Returns 400 error
Backend: CNPJ lookup with non-existent CNPJ - Returns appropriate error
Backend: CNPJ lookup without authentication - Returns 401/403
Backend: CNPJ lookup with unformatted CNPJ - Works correctly
Backend: CEP lookup for valid CEP - Returns correct address data
Frontend: Navigation to Administrativo system works
Frontend: Novo Cadastro modal opens correctly
Frontend: Pessoa dropdown changes form fields (PF to PJ)
Frontend: CNPJ field with search button appears for Pessoa Jurídica
Frontend: CNPJ lookup auto-fills all fields (Razão Social, Nome Fantasia, Telefone, CEP, Endereço, Número, Complemento, Bairro, Cidade, UF)
Frontend: Success toast 'Dados preenchidos automaticamente!' appears after CNPJ lookup
seed_data_creation: None required - used existing test user
context_for_next_testing_agent: CNPJ lookup feature tested and working. The endpoint /api/consulta/cnpj/{cnpj} uses BrasilAPI to fetch company data from Receita Federal. Frontend integration in CadastrosPage.jsx correctly calls the API and auto-fills form fields. Test CNPJ used: 00000000000191 (Banco do Brasil).

frontend_integration.trigger: Search button (lupa icon) next to CNPJ field
